package handlers

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for middleware_type_outside_middleware_package.
// Rule intent: Shared middleware types and constructors declared in handlers or services instead of a middleware-focused package.
type CaseMiddlewareTypeOutsideMiddlewarePackageDTO struct {
	ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
	TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
	Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
	Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareTypeOutsideMiddlewarePackageModel struct {
	ID       string         `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	TenantID string         `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string         `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
	DeletedAt sql.NullTime  `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareTypeOutsideMiddlewarePackageRepository struct {
	db    *gorm.DB
	sqlDB *sql.DB
}

type AuthMiddleware struct {
	SecretKey string
	Repo      *CaseMiddlewareTypeOutsideMiddlewarePackageRepository
}

func (m *AuthMiddleware) Handle() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		token := c.GetHeader("Authorization")
		if token == "" {
			c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "missing token"})
			return
		}
		c.Set("auth_token", token)
		c.Next()
	}
}

type LoggingMiddleware struct {
	Repo *CaseMiddlewareTypeOutsideMiddlewarePackageRepository
}

func (m *LoggingMiddleware) Handle() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.Set("request_id", "req-123")
		c.Next()
	}
}

type RateLimitMiddleware struct {
	MaxRequests int
	Repo        *CaseMiddlewareTypeOutsideMiddlewarePackageRepository
}

func (m *RateLimitMiddleware) Handle() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.Set("rate_limited", true)
		c.Next()
	}
}

func PositiveMiddlewareTypeOutsideMiddlewarePackage(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB) error {
	repo := &CaseMiddlewareTypeOutsideMiddlewarePackageRepository{db: db, sqlDB: sqlDB}

	authMW := &AuthMiddleware{SecretKey: "my-secret", Repo: repo}
	loggingMW := &LoggingMiddleware{Repo: repo}
	rateLimitMW := &RateLimitMiddleware{MaxRequests: 100, Repo: repo}

	handler := func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "handled"})
	}

	routed := authMW.Handle()
	routed = loggingMW.Handle()(routed)
	routed = rateLimitMW.Handle()(routed)

	routed(c)
	return nil
}
